message:
test(fp-frame): grouped rolling std/var Int64 + all-NaN coverage (br-frankenpandas-9uuq)

x5oy already added the float-input groupby_rolling_std_var_respect
test; 9uuq is satisfied by complementary edge-case coverage that
exercises the dtype-coercion and degenerate-window paths the original
test did not hit.

Two new tests:

- groupby_rolling_std_var_int64_input_widens_to_float_with_ddof1_semantics:
  Int64 input column, multi-row groups with constant tails. Locks
  ddof=1 sample-variance numerics (var = 4/3 for [2,4,4]; var = 0
  for [4,4,4] and [10,10,10]) AND verifies output dtype widens to
  Float64.
- groupby_rolling_std_var_all_nan_window_emits_nan: Interleaved
  groups where one group is fully NaN; rolling(window=2) std/var
  must return NaN for every position whose window has fewer than
  min_periods non-null values.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
